title: Front Office Manager - FabHotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - FabHotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, FabHotels in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
